title: Velvety Greek Yogurt Soup
description: A fresh, cold, probiotic-packed soup that soothes hangovers with velvety yogurt, horseradish, and fermented tang.

ingredients.name: Greek yogurt (plain, non-fat)
ingredients.notes: Use plain to keep it pure and creamy

ingredients.name: Low‑sodium vegetable broth, chilled
ingredients.notes: Can be replaced with chicken broth for extra flavor

ingredients.name: Fresh cucumber, peeled, seeded, diced
ingredients.notes: Keep the skin on for extra nutrients

ingredients.name: Horseradish, grated
ingredients.notes: Fresh or prepared, adjust to taste

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk the Greek yogurt until smooth.
2. Gradually stir in the chilled vegetable broth, mixing until fully incorporated.
3. Fold in the diced cucumber, chopped dill, lemon juice, grated horseradish, and fermented brine if using.
4. Drizzle the olive oil over the mixture and season with salt and pepper.
5. Use a whisk or fork to combine all ingredients until the soup is velvety and well‑marinated.
6. Place the bowl in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to chill and allow flavors to meld.
7. Before serving, gently stir the soup again to ensure even distribution of herbs and horseradish.
8. Serve cold, garnished with a few extra dill sprigs or a light drizzle of olive oil if desired.
9. For an extra burst of freshness, add a splash of lemon juice or a pinch more horseradish.
10. Enjoy immediately as a revitalizing lunch or brunch.
